content:
f* = (bp - q) / b
Where: b = odds received, p = win probability, q = 1 - p

For crypto: use fractional Kelly (25-50%) due to high variance.
title: Kelly Criterion

content:
Position Size = Account Risk × Risk Per Trade / Distance to Stop Loss

| Account Size | Max Risk Per Trade | Max Total Exposure |
|-------------|--------------------|--------------------|
| < $1,000 | 2% | 10% |
| $1,000 - $10,000 | 1-2% | 15% |
| > $10,000 | 0.5-1% | 20% |
title: Risk-Based Sizing

content:
- Max 3 losing trades per session → stop trading for the day
- Max 5% daily drawdown → stop for the day
- Max 10% weekly drawdown → review system
title: Session Limits

content:
1. **Never risk more than 1-2% of capital on a single trade**
2. **Always use stop losses** — no exceptions
3. **Diversify across uncorrelated assets**
4. **Keep a cash reserve** — minimum 20% not deployed
title: Core Rules

content:
Adjust position size based on:
- Account equity curve (reduce when drawdown > 5%)
- Current volatility (smaller positions in high VIX periods)
- Confidence score from AstroFin signals

| Signal Confidence | Position Size Multiplier |
|-------------------|-------------------------|
| 90-100% | 1.5× base |
| 70-89% | 1.0× base |
| 50-69% | 0.5× base |
| < 50% | Skip trade |
title: Dynamic Risk Scaling

content:
- Drawdown > 5%: reduce risk by 50%
- Drawdown > 10%: halt trading, review system
- Drawdown > 20%: trading account is suspended
title: Drawdown Rules
